entries.name: abort
entries.summary: Submits an error message to the information queue and terminates the current draw or dispatch call being executed.

entries.name: abs
entries.summary: Returns the absolute value of the specified value.

entries.name: acos
entries.summary: Returns the arccosine of the specified value.

entries.name: all
entries.summary: Determines if all components of the specified value are non-zero.

entries.name: AllMemoryBarrier
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all memory accesses have been completed.

entries.name: AllMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all memory accesses have been completed and all threads in the group have reached this call.

entries.name: any
entries.summary: Determines if any components of the specified value are non-zero.

entries.name: asdouble
entries.summary: Reinterprets a cast value (two 32-bit values) into a double.

entries.name: asfloat
entries.summary: Interprets the bit pattern of

entries.name: asin
entries.summary: Returns the arcsine of the specified value.

entries.name: asint
entries.summary: Interprets the bit pattern of

entries.name: asuint
entries.summary: Interprets the bit pattern of

entries.name: atan
entries.summary: Returns the arctangent of the specified value.

entries.name: atan2
entries.summary: Returns the arctangent of two values (y,x).

entries.name: ceil
entries.summary: Returns the smallest integer value that is greater than or equal to the specified value.

entries.name: CheckAccessFullyMapped
entries.summary: Determines whether all values from a

entries.name: clamp
entries.summary: Clamps the specified value to the specified minimum and maximum range.

entries.name: clip
entries.summary: Discards the current pixel if the specified value is less than zero.

entries.name: cos
entries.summary: Returns the cosine of the specified value.

entries.name: cosh
entries.summary: Returns the hyperbolic cosine of the specified value.

entries.name: countbits
entries.summary: Counts the number of bits (per component) set in the input integer.

entries.name: cross
entries.summary: Returns the cross product of two floating-point, 3D vectors.

entries.name: D3DCOLORtoUBYTE4
entries.summary: Converts a floating-point, 4D vector set by a D3DCOLOR to a UBYTE4.

entries.name: ddx
entries.summary: Returns the partial derivative of the specified value with respect to the screen-space x-coordinate.

entries.name: ddy
entries.summary: Returns the partial derivative of the specified value with respect to the screen-space y-coordinate.

entries.name: degrees
entries.summary: Converts the specified value from radians to degrees.

entries.name: determinant
entries.summary: Returns the determinant of the specified floating-point, square matrix.

entries.name: DeviceMemoryBarrier
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all device memory accesses have been completed.

entries.name: DeviceMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all device memory accesses have been completed and all threads in the group have reached this call.

entries.name: distance
entries.summary: Returns a distance scalar between two vectors.

entries.name: dot
entries.summary: Returns the dot product of two vectors.

entries.name: dst
entries.summary: Calculates a distance vector.

entries.name: errorf
entries.summary: Submits an error message to the information queue.

entries.name: EvaluateAttributeAtSample
entries.summary: Evaluates at the indexed sample location.

entries.name: EvaluateAttributeCentroid
entries.summary: Evaluates at the pixel centroid.

entries.name: EvaluateAttributeSnapped
entries.summary: Evaluates at the pixel centroid with an offset.

entries.name: exp
entries.summary: Returns the base-e exponential, or e

entries.name: exp2
entries.summary: Returns the base 2 exponential, or 2

entries.name: f16tof32
entries.summary: Converts the float16 stored in the low-half of the uint to a float.

entries.name: f32tof16
entries.summary: Converts an input into a float16 type.

entries.name: faceforward
entries.summary: Flips the surface-normal (if needed) to face in a direction opposite to i; returns the result in n.

entries.name: firstbithigh
entries.summary: Gets the location of the first set bit starting from the highest order bit and working downward, per component.

entries.name: firstbitlow
entries.summary: Returns the location of the first set bit starting from the lowest order bit and working upward, per component. This intrinsic corresponds to the DXBC instruction

entries.name: floor
entries.summary: Returns the largest integer that is less than or equal to the specified value.

entries.name: fma
entries.summary: Returns the double-precision fused multiply-addition of a * b + c.

entries.name: fmod
entries.summary: Returns the floating-point remainder of x/y.

entries.name: frac
entries.summary: Returns the fractional (or decimal) part of x; which is greater than or equal to 0 and less than 1.

entries.name: frexp
entries.summary: Returns the mantissa and exponent of the specified floating-point value.

entries.name: fwidth
entries.summary: Returns the absolute value of the partial derivatives of the specified value.

entries.name: GetRenderTargetSampleCount
entries.summary: Gets the number of samples for a render target.

entries.name: GetRenderTargetSamplePosition
entries.summary: Gets the sampling position (x,y) for a given sample index.

entries.name: GroupMemoryBarrier
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all group shared accesses have been completed.

entries.name: GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync
entries.summary: Blocks execution of all threads in a group until all group shared accesses have been completed and all threads in the group have reached this call.

entries.name: InterlockedAdd
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic add of value to the dest resource variable.

entries.name: InterlockedAnd
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic and.

entries.name: InterlockedCompareExchange
entries.summary: Atomically compares the destination with the comparison value. If they are identical, the destination is overwritten with the input value. The original value is set to the destination's original value.

entries.name: InterlockedCompareStore
entries.summary: Atomically compares the destination to the comparison value. If they are identical, the destination is overwritten with the input value.

entries.name: InterlockedExchange
entries.summary: Assigns value to dest and returns the original value.

entries.name: InterlockedMax
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic max.

entries.name: InterlockedMin
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic min.

entries.name: InterlockedOr
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic or.

entries.name: InterlockedXor
entries.summary: Performs a guaranteed atomic xor.

entries.name: isfinite
entries.summary: Determines if the specified floating-point value is finite.

entries.name: isinf
entries.summary: Determines if the specified value is infinite.

entries.name: isnan
entries.summary: Determines if the specified value is NAN or QNAN.

entries.name: ldexp
entries.summary: Returns the result of multiplying the specified value by two, raised to the power of the specified exponent.

entries.name: length
entries.summary: Returns the length of the specified floating-point vector.

entries.name: lerp
entries.summary: Performs a linear interpolation.

entries.name: lit
entries.summary: Returns a lighting coefficient vector.

entries.name: log
entries.summary: Returns the base-e logarithm of the specified value.

entries.name: log10
entries.summary: Returns the base-10 logarithm of the specified value.

entries.name: log2
entries.summary: Returns the base-2 logarithm of the specified value.

entries.name: mad
entries.summary: Performs an arithmetic multiply/add operation on three values.

entries.name: matrix
entries.summary: A matrix is a data type that contains between one and sixteen

entries.name: max
entries.summary: Selects the greater of x and y.

entries.name: min
entries.summary: Selects the lesser of x and y.

entries.name: modf
entries.summary: Splits the value x into fractional and integer parts, each of which has the same sign as x.

entries.name: msad4
entries.summary: Compares a 4-byte reference value and an 8-byte source value and accumulates a vector of 4 sums. Each sum corresponds to the masked sum of absolute differences of a different byte alignment between the reference value and the source value.

entries.name: mul
entries.summary: Multiplies x and y using matrix math. The inner dimension x-columns and y-rows must be equal.

entries.name: noise
entries.summary: Generates a random value using the Perlin-noise algorithm.

entries.name: normalize
entries.summary: Normalizes the specified floating-point vector according to x / length(x).

entries.name: pow
entries.summary: Returns the specified value raised to the specified power.

entries.name: printf
entries.summary: Submits a custom shader message to the information queue.

entries.name: Process2DQuadTessFactorsAvg
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: Process2DQuadTessFactorsMax
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: Process2DQuadTessFactorsMin
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: ProcessIsolineTessFactors
entries.summary: Generates the rounded tessellation factors for an isoline.

entries.name: ProcessQuadTessFactorsAvg
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: ProcessQuadTessFactorsMax
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: ProcessQuadTessFactorsMin
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a quad patch.

entries.name: ProcessTriTessFactorsAvg
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a tri patch.

entries.name: ProcessTriTessFactorsMax
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a tri patch.

entries.name: ProcessTriTessFactorsMin
entries.summary: Generates the corrected tessellation factors for a tri patch.

entries.name: radians
entries.summary: Converts the specified value from degrees to radians.

entries.name: rcp
entries.summary: Calculates a fast, approximate, per-component reciprocal.

entries.name: reflect
entries.summary: Returns a reflection vector using an incident ray and a surface normal.

entries.name: refract
entries.summary: Returns a refraction vector using an entering ray, a surface normal, and a refraction index.

entries.name: reversebits
entries.summary: Reverses the order of the bits, per component.

entries.name: round
entries.summary: Rounds the specified value to the nearest integer. Halfway cases are rounded to the nearest even.

entries.name: rsqrt
entries.summary: Returns the reciprocal of the square root of the specified value.

entries.name: saturate
entries.summary: Clamps the specified value within the range of 0 to 1.

entries.name: scalar
entries.summary: HLSL supports several scalar data types:

entries.name: sign
entries.summary: Returns the sign of

entries.name: sin
entries.summary: Returns the sine of the specified value.

entries.name: sincos
entries.summary: Returns the sine and cosine of x.

entries.name: sinh
entries.summary: Returns the hyperbolic sine of the specified value.

entries.name: smoothstep
entries.summary: Returns a smooth Hermite interpolation between 0 and 1, if

entries.name: sqrt
entries.summary: Returns the square root of the specified floating-point value, per component.

entries.name: step
entries.summary: Compares two values, returning 0 or 1 based on which value is greater.

entries.name: tan
entries.summary: Returns the tangent of the specified value.

entries.name: tanh
entries.summary: Returns the hyperbolic tangent of the specified value.

entries.name: tex1D
entries.summary: Samples a 1D texture.

entries.name: tex1Dbias
entries.summary: Samples a 1D texture after biasing the mip level by t.w.

entries.name: tex1Dgrad
entries.summary: Samples a 1D texture using a gradient to select the mip level.

entries.name: tex1Dlod
entries.summary: Samples a 1D texture with mipmaps. The mipmap LOD is specified in t.w.

entries.name: tex1Dproj
entries.summary: Samples a 1D texture using a projective divide; the texture coordinate is divided by t.w before the lookup takes place.

entries.name: tex2D
entries.summary: Samples a 2D texture.

entries.name: tex2Dbias
entries.summary: Samples a 2D texture after biasing the mip level by t.w.

entries.name: tex2Dgrad
entries.summary: Samples a 2D texture using a gradient to select the mip level.

entries.name: tex2Dlod
entries.summary: Samples a 2D texture with mipmaps. The mipmap LOD is specified in t.w.

entries.name: tex2Dproj
entries.summary: Samples a 2D texture using a projective divide; the texture coordinate is divided by t.w before the lookup takes place.

entries.name: tex3D
entries.summary: Samples a 3D texture.

entries.name: tex3Dbias
entries.summary: Samples a 3D texture after biasing the mip level by t.w.

entries.name: tex3Dgrad
entries.summary: Samples a 3D texture using a gradient to select the mip level.

entries.name: tex3Dlod
entries.summary: Samples a 3D texture with mipmaps. The mipmap LOD is specified in t.w.

entries.name: tex3Dproj
entries.summary: Samples a 3D texture using a projective divide; the texture coordinate is divided by t.w before the lookup takes place.

entries.name: texCUBE
entries.summary: Samples a cube texture.

entries.name: texCUBEbias
entries.summary: Samples a cube texture after biasing the mip level by t.w.

entries.name: texCUBEgrad
entries.summary: Samples a cube texture using a gradient to select the mip level.

entries.name: texCUBElod
entries.summary: Samples a cube texture with mipmaps. The mipmap LOD is specified in t.w.

entries.name: texCUBEproj
entries.summary: Samples a cube texture using a projective divide; the texture coordinate is divided by t.w before the lookup takes place.

entries.name: transpose
entries.summary: Transposes the specified input matrix.

entries.name: trunc
entries.summary: Truncates a floating-point value to the integer component.

entries.summary: A vector is a data type that contains between one and four
